parameters.text:
=You are an expert resume writer and ATS (Applicant Tracking System) specialist.

Your task is to create a customized, ATS-optimized resume for the candidate based on their base resume and the provided job description.

IMPORTANT RULES:
1. ONLY include skills, technologies, and experiences that are RELEVANT to the job description. Do NOT add skills not present in the base resume.
2. Re-order and re-emphasize bullet points to highlight what's most relevant to this specific role.
3. Incorporate exact keywords and phrases from the job description naturally throughout the resume.
4. Keep the tone professional and concise — no fluff.
5. Use strong action verbs and quantified achievements wherever possible.
6. Do NOT invent or fabricate any experience, skills, or numbers not present in the base resume.
7. Format the output as clean plain text suitable for ATS parsing — no markdown symbols like ** or ##, no tables, no columns — just clean text with proper spacing and section headers in ALL CAPS.
8. Maintain this exact structure:
   - Name & Contact Info
   - PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY (rewritten for this role)
   - TECHNICAL SKILLS (only relevant ones, organized by category)
   - PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE (with role-relevant bullet points first)
   - PROJECTS (only the most relevant 2-3 projects)
   - AWARDS
   - EDUCATION

---
BASE RESUME:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.baseResume }}

---
JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.jobDescription }}

---
Now generate the tailored, ATS-optimized resume below. Output ONLY the resume text — nothing else.

parameters.jsCode:
function cleanText(t) { return (t || '').replace(/```[a-z]*\n?/gi, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); } const resumeText = cleanText($json.text || $json.message || ''); const meta = $('Prepare Input').item.json; const recipientEmail = meta.recipientEmail || 'rvnegi786@gmail.com'; const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }); const jdPreview = (meta.jobDescription || '').substring(0, 100).replace(/\n/g, ' ').trim(); const docTitle = `Tailored Resume - ${dateStr}`; const emailBody = `
🎯

Your Tailored Resume is Ready

ResumeForge AI · Powered by Google Gemini

Hi Ravinder,

Your ATS-optimized resume has been generated and is attached as a PDF. It has been tailored for:

${jdPreview}...

💡 Next Steps

  • Open the attached PDF and review carefully
  • Submit the PDF directly — ATS systems prefer PDF format
  • Double-check all dates and company names before applying

Built by Ravinder Singh Negi · ResumeForge AI

`; return { resumeText, docTitle, recipientEmail, emailBody, subject: `📄 Your Tailored Resume — ${dateStr} | ResumeForge AI` };

json.text:
RAVINDER SINGH NEGI
New Delhi, India | +91-9756726341 | rvnegi786@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/ravinder-singh-negi | ravindernegi.vercel.app | github.com/Ravinder2001

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior Frontend Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience specializing in building pixel-perfect, high-performance user interfaces using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript. Proven ability to develop scalable, reusable component libraries and implement responsive designs that work seamlessly across all devices. Skilled in web performance optimization, conducting frontend code reviews, and collaborating effectively in Agile teams. Delivered significant improvements in development speed and user experience for complex web applications.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Frontend Technologies: React.js, Next.js (SSR, SSG, App Router), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), Responsive UI, Component Architecture, Performance Optimization (Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, code splitting)
Development Tools: Git, GitHub, Vercel, CI/CD, npm, Agile Development

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer | Mar 2022 – Present
Indus Net Technologies (INT.), Kolkata
-   Architected and delivered 30+ production-ready frontend features using React.js and Next.js for enterprise pharmaceutical platforms, impacting 1000+ internal users.
-   Developed over 50 reusable UI components, establishing a scalable component library that enhanced frontend development speed by 40% and ensured consistent responsive design across multiple products.
-   Led frontend implementation of complex dashboards and workflow systems, expertly handling large datasets and business-critical operations, ensuring a high-performance user experience.
-   Improved code quality and enforced best practices through structured frontend code reviews, refactoring initiatives, and modern architecture patterns across the team.
-   Collaborated effectively within an Agile team structure, contributing to 2-week sprint cycles for feature delivery.
-   Promoted from Associate Software Engineer to Software Engineer within 2 years due to consistent high performance and significant technical contributions.

PROJECTS
Hisabkar — Expense Splitter PWA | React.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS
-   Designed and deployed a scalable Progressive Web App (PWA) for personal finance management, featuring real-time transaction handling and cloud deployment.
Create Pro App — CLI Tool | Node.js, Open Source
-   Built and published an open-source Node.js CLI tool to bootstrap modern React projects, focusing on optimized tooling and project structure, contributing to the frontend community.

AWARDS
WOW Award (2×) — Indus Net Technologies | Feb 2024 & Jun 2024
Recognised twice for outstanding performance and significant technical contributions to key enterprise projects.

EDUCATION
Sikkim Manipal University | Mar 2024 – Mar 2026
Master of Computer Applications (MCA) — Computer Science

Masai School | Apr 2021 – Jan 2022
Full Stack Web Development Program
